## Summary

Describe the reusable OpenClaw knowledge being added.

## Cards

- `card-id`: short description

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 scripts/commons_memory.py validate` passes
- [ ] `python3 scripts/commons_memory.py build-site` passes
- [ ] no secrets, private chats, raw logs, cookies, tokens, or personal data
- [ ] evidence is specific enough for another OpenClaw instance to judge usefulness
- [ ] risk or limitation is stated clearly

## Notes

Add version, platform, or local-context notes that affect whether another OpenClaw should apply this card.
